Collapsible.default: @slot - Renders the collapsible content.; render: <slot @slotchange=...></slot>; ::slotted(*) { --m3e-collapsible-animation-duration: initial; }

Slide.default: @slot - Renders the items through which to cycle.; render: <slot @slotchange=...></slot>; ::slotted(*) { width: 100%; ... }; ::slotted(.-before), ::slotted(.-after) (implies multiple items)

TextHighlight.default:
@slot - Renders the content to highlight.; render: ; _findTextNodes walks all assigned nodes (supports multiple text-bearing elements); example:

Lorem ipsum…

TextOverflow.default: @slot - Renders the content to truncate with an ellipsis.; render: ; styles: white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis (single-line truncation); example shows plain text content

FocusTrap.default: @slot - Renders content for which to trap focus. (core-a11y.js); render: ${trap}<slot></slot>${trap}; walkSlot/walkTree traverse all assigned children

FloatingPanel.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the panel. (core-anchoring.js); render:

AppBar.leading: @slot leading - Renders content positioned at the start of the bar. Template: <slot name="leading"> inside .leading-icon div. JSDoc example shows <m3e-icon-button slot="leading-icon"> (now leading). No ::slotted CSS but handler is _handleLeadingIconSlotChange (singular).
AppBar.title: @slot title - Renders the title of the bar. Template: inside .title div. JSDoc example: Top 10 hiking trails. Handler: _handleTitleSlotChange (singular). CSS hides .title when .base:not(.with-title).
AppBar.subtitle: @slot subtitle - Renders the subtitle of the bar. Template: inside .subtitle div. JSDoc example: Discover popular trails. Handler: _handleSubtitleSlotChange (singular). CSS hides .subtitle when .base:not(.with-subtitle).
AppBar.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders one or more action buttons aligned to the end of the bar. Template: <slot name="trailing"> inside .trailing-icon div. Handler: _handleTrailingIconsSlotChange (pluralized — confirms multi). JSDoc example: <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-icon"> (now trailing).

Option.default: @slot - Renders the label of the option. Template: unnamed <slot> inside <m3e-text-highlight>; handleSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target) to derive option label/value.

Optgroup.default: @slot - Renders the options of the group. Template: unnamed <slot></slot>; handleMutation querySelectorAll("m3e-option") confirms expected children are m3e-option elements.
Optgroup.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the group. Template: <slot name="label"> inside <m3e-text-overflow>; handleLabelSlotChange uses assignedElements()[0] to wire aria-labelledby.

OptionPanel.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the list. Template: unnamed <slot>; handleMutation querySelectorAll("m3e-option") + instanceof M3eOptGroupElement; CSS registerStyleSheet 'm3e-option-panel > m3e-divider { margin-block: ... }' confirms divider as valid child.
OptionPanel.no-data: Not in @slot JSDoc (discrepancy vs template). Template: <slot name="no-data"> inside .no-data div; handleNoDataSlotChange toggles --with-no-data state. Accepts arbitrary empty-state content; text is the primary use case.
OptionPanel.loading: Not in @slot JSDoc (discrepancy vs template). Template: <slot name="loading"> inside .loading div; handleLoadingSlotChange calls querySelector("m3e-loading-indicator[slot='loading'], m3e-circular-progress-indicator[slot='loading']") to set --with-loading-indicator state.

FormField.default: @slot - Renders the control of the field.; KNOWN_FORM_FIELD_TAGS = ["m3e-input-chip-set", "m3e-select"]; isFormFieldControl checks instanceof HTMLInputElement|HTMLTextAreaElement|HTMLSelectElement; ::slotted(input), ::slotted(textarea), ::slotted(select), ::slotted(m3e-select), ::slotted(m3e-input-chip-set)
FormField.label: NOT in @slot JSDoc (lines 90-96) or CEM, but render template has <slot name="label" @slotchange="...handleLabelSlotChange"> and CSS has ::slotted([slot="label"]) { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }; usage example at line 83: <label slot="label" for="field">Text field</label>. Template/CSS trusted over absent JSDoc.
FormField.prefix: @slot prefix - Renders content before the fields's control.; no ::slotted kind constraints for this slot
FormField.prefix-text: @slot prefix-text - Renders text before the fields's control.
FormField.suffix: @slot suffix - Renders content after the fields's control.; no ::slotted kind constraints for this slot
FormField.suffix-text: @slot suffix-text - Renders text after the fields's control.
FormField.hint: @slot hint - Renders hint text in the fields's subscript, when the control is valid.
FormField.error: @slot error - Renders error text in the fields's subscript, when the control is invalid.; template: <slot name="error">${this._validationMessage}</slot> (fallback to internal validation message)

Autocomplete.default: @slot - Renders the options of the autocomplete.; render template: <slot></slot> inside <div class="options">; querySelectorAll("m3e-option") and querySelectorAll("m3e-optgroup") on light DOM clone; example shows multiple <m3e-option> children
Autocomplete.loading: @slot loading - Renders content when loading options.; querySelector("[slot='loading']") detects presence; fallback (line 608-614) creates a <span slot="loading"> containing a text span — template has no <slot name="loading">, projection handled via custom clone mechanism
Autocomplete.no-data: @slot no-data - Renders content when there are no options to show.; querySelector("[slot='no-data']") detects presence; fallback (line 598-605) creates a <span slot="no-data"> containing a text span — template has no <slot name="no-data">, projection handled via custom clone mechanism

Avatar.default: @slot - Renders the content of the avatar.; render: ; ::slotted(img) { display: block; ... }; examples show text initials ("AB"), , and

Badge.default: @slot - Renders the content of the badge. | template:   (fallback present → not required) | singular handler _M3eBadgeElement_handleSlotChange → multi false

BottomSheetAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; ActionElementBase.render() = html`<slot></slot>`; .d.ts example shows text 'Google Keep'; ActionElementBase.styles: ::slotted(.material-icons) confirms icon support

BottomSheet.default: @slot - Renders the content of the sheet.; render template: <slot></slot>; BottomSheetElement.d.ts example shows <m3e-action-list> directly in the sheet's default slot
BottomSheet.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the sheet.; render template: <slot name="header"></slot>

BottomSheetTrigger.default: @slot - Renders the content of the trigger.; ActionElementBase.render() = html`<slot></slot>`; .d.ts example shows text 'Open Bottom sheet' in slot; ActionElementBase.styles: ::slotted(.material-icons) confirms icon support

BreadcrumbItemButton.icon: Template: `<slot class="icon" name="icon" aria-hidden="true"></slot>`; CSS: `::slotted([slot="icon"]) { font-size: inherit !important; flex: none; }` and `::slotted(svg[slot="icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }`
BreadcrumbItemButton.default: Template: `<slot @slotchange="..."></slot>` inside `<m3e-text-overflow>`; handleSlotChange calls `isIconOnly(e.target)` confirming slot accepts either text label or a single icon

BreadcrumbItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the item's label; updateIconFilled uses `querySelectorAll("m3e-icon")` confirming icon kind; template: `<slot name="icon" slot="icon" @slotchange="..."></slot>`
BreadcrumbItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the breadcrumb item; handleSlotChange calls `isIconOnly(e.target)` confirming slot accepts either text label or icon (icon-only mode)

Breadcrumb.default: @slot - Renders breadcrumb items; handleSlotChange uses `querySelectorAll("m3e-breadcrumb-item")` and iterates with for-loop over all items; wrapper is `role="list"`
Breadcrumb.separator: @slot separator - Renders a custom separator between breadcrumb items; template: `<slot name="separator" @slotchange="..."></slot>`; no ::slotted selector or instanceof constraint — accepts arbitrary custom separator content

Button.default: @slot - Renders the label of the button. Template: <slot></slot> inside .label div; also used as fallback inside <slot name="selected"><slot></slot></slot>
Button.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the button's label. Template: <slot class="icon" name="icon" aria-hidden="true">. CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"])
Button.selected: @slot selected - Renders the label of the button, when selected. Template: <slot name="selected"><slot></slot></slot> (only rendered when toggle && selected)
Button.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders an icon before the button's label, when selected. Template: <slot class="icon" name="selected-icon" aria-hidden="true">. CSS: ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]). Handler: _M3eButtonElement_handleSelectedIconSlotChange (singular)
Button.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the button's label. Template: <slot class="icon" name="trailing-icon" aria-hidden="true">. CSS: ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"])

IconButton.default: @slot - Renders the icon of the button. | template: <slot class="icon" aria-hidden="true"> (always rendered) | ::slotted(svg) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }
IconButton.selected: @slot selected - Renders an icon, when selected. | template: <slot class="icon" name="selected" aria-hidden="true" @slotchange="..._handleSelectedIconSlotChange"> only rendered when toggle attr present; CSS hides it when not [selected]

ButtonGroup.default: @slot - Renders the buttons of the group.; render template has bare <slot>; queryAssignedElements({ slot: "", selector: "m3e-button,m3e-icon-button" }); handleChange guards on e.target.tagName === "M3E-BUTTON" || "M3E-ICON-BUTTON"

RichTooltipAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; ActionElementBase.render() returns html`<slot></slot>`; example shows text 'Learn more' as child

RichTooltip.default: @slot - The main supporting text of the tooltip.; template: <slot @slotchange='...'> inside div.content; handleContentSlotChange reads text
RichTooltip.subhead: @slot subhead - Optional subhead text displayed above the supporting content.; template: <slot name='subhead'> inside div.subhead; .base:not(.has-subhead) .subhead { display: none } confirms optional
RichTooltip.actions:
@slot actions - Optional action elements displayed at the bottom of the tooltip.; template: in div.actions; ::slotted([slot='actions']) { flex: none; display: flex; ... } targets each slotted element; example:
...
; .base:not(.has-actions) .actions { display: none } confirms optional

Tooltip.default: @slot - Renders the content of the tooltip.; template: <slot @slotchange='...'> inside div.base; handleSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target, true) to extract aria-description text; example: <m3e-tooltip for='button'>Go Back</m3e-tooltip>

Calendar.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the calendar.; template: <slot name="header">${renderHeader()}</slot> with default fallback content; no ::slotted selectors or instanceof constraints

Card.default: @slot - Renders the content of the card without padding; render template: unnamed <slot> is fallback inside <slot name="content">, so default children render when no content slot is used
Card.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the card; ::slotted(img[slot="header"]), ::slotted(video[slot="header"]) { border-radius: ... } — accepts img/video as header media (not in vocabulary) and generic content; no instanceof check restricts to a specific vocabulary kind
Card.content: @slot content - Renders the content of the card with padding; ::slotted([slot="content"]) { flex: 1 1 auto; } — single flex content region
Card.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions of the card; ::slotted([slot="actions"][end]) { justify-content: flex-end; } — [end] attribute targets individual action elements for alignment; M3 card taxonomy places multiple action buttons here
Card.footer: @slot footer - Renders the footer of the card; ::slotted([slot="footer"]) { flex: none; display: flex; align-items: center; } — single footer region

Chip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; render template: _renderSlot() returns <slot @slotchange="...">; chip is non-functional without a label
Chip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; _renderIcon() returns <slot name="icon" aria-hidden="true">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { flex: none; width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-chip-icon-size) }
Chip.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the chip's label.; _renderTrailingIcon() returns <slot name="trailing-icon" aria-hidden="true">; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) { flex: none; width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-chip-icon-size) }

AssistChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() from M3eChipElement (not overridden); _renderTrailingIcon() overridden to return nothing — trailing-icon slot absent
AssistChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() → <slot name="icon" aria-hidden="true"> from M3eChipElement

ChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; render template: html`<slot></slot>`; generic flex container — examples show m3e-chip, m3e-assist-chip, m3e-suggestion-chip; no querySelector restriction

FilterChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() → <slot @slotchange="..."> from M3eChipElement
FilterChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; _renderIcon() override wraps super._renderIcon() which renders <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"] ) { display: none !important } when selected (per CSS)
FilterChip.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the chip's label.; _renderTrailingIcon() NOT overridden in FilterChip — inherits <slot name="trailing-icon" aria-hidden="true"> from M3eChipElement; FilterChip styles include ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) color rules

FilterChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; _handleSlotChange calls querySelectorAll('m3e-filter-chip') to build selection manager items

InputChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() → <slot @slotchange="..."> from M3eChipElement; rendered inside .label div in InputChip's own render()
InputChip.avatar: @slot avatar - Renders an avatar before the chip's label.; render(): <slot name="avatar" @slotchange="_handleAvatarSlotChange">; ::slotted(m3e-avatar[slot="avatar"]) { --m3e-avatar-size: ... }
InputChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() → <slot name="icon" aria-hidden="true">; CSS hides it when avatar present: :host(:is(:state(--with-avatar),...)) ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { display: none }
InputChip.remove-icon: @slot remove-icon - Renders the icon for the button used to remove the chip.; _renderTrailingIcon(): <slot name="remove-icon"><svg class="remove-icon" ...>fallback X</svg></slot> inside m3e-icon-button

InputChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; _handleSlotChange calls querySelectorAll('m3e-input-chip'); ::slotted(m3e-input-chip) { min-width: 0 }
InputChipSet.input: @slot input - Renders the input element used to add new chips to the set.; <slot name="input" @slotchange="_handleInputSlotChange">; handler does querySelector('input') — native HTML <input> element, no M3E vocabulary kind applies

SuggestionChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() → <slot @slotchange="..."> from M3eChipElement; _renderTrailingIcon() overridden to return nothing — trailing-icon slot absent
SuggestionChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() → <slot name="icon" aria-hidden="true"> from M3eChipElement

ContentPane.default: @slot - Renders the content of the pane. (line 29); render template confirms unnamed <slot></slot> inside .scroll-container (line 52); no ::slotted selectors or instanceof checks — accepts arbitrary content

DialogAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; example: <m3e-dialog-action return-value="ok">Close</m3e-dialog-action> (text label)

Dialog.default: @slot - Renders the content of the dialog.; template: <slot> inside <m3e-scroll-container class="content">
Dialog.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the dialog.; ::slotted([slot="header"]) applies headline.small typography (flex:1 1 auto)
Dialog.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions of the dialog.; template: <slot name="actions" @slotchange>; ::slotted([slot="actions"]) styles as flex; example places a generic <div slot="actions"> wrapper — no specific component kind
Dialog.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the icon of the button used to close the dialog.; template: <slot name="close-icon"><svg>…</svg></slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]) width:1em; has SVG default so not required

DrawerContainer.default: @slot - Renders the main content. Confirmed by unnamed <slot></slot> inside .content div in render template.
DrawerContainer.start: @slot start - Renders the start drawer. Confirmed by <slot name="start"> inside .start/.m3e-focus-trap div; ::slotted([slot="start"]) CSS applies height:100% and width token.
DrawerContainer.end: @slot end - Renders the end drawer. Confirmed by <slot name="end"> inside .end/.m3e-focus-trap div; ::slotted([slot="end"]) CSS applies height:100% and width token.

Accordion.default: @slot - Renders the panels of the accordion; ::slotted(m3e-expansion-panel) in styles; querySelectorAll("m3e-expansion-panel") in _M3eAccordionElement_handleSlotChange

ExpansionHeader.default: @slot - Renders the content of the header; render:
ExpansionHeader.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the icon of the expansion toggle; ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]) { font-size: inherit !important; flex: none; }; ::slotted(svg[slot="toggle-icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }

ExpansionPanel.default: @slot - Renders the detail of the panel; render:
ExpansionPanel.header: @slot header - Renders the header content; render: inside internal m3e-expansion-header; example shows Panel 1
ExpansionPanel.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions bar of the panel; ::slotted([slot="actions"]) { flex: none; display: flex; align-items: center; column-gap: ...; }; ::slotted([slot="actions"][end]) { justify-content: flex-end; } — [end] variant implies multiple action groups can be slotted simultaneously
ExpansionPanel.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the expansion toggle icon; ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]) { font-size: inherit !important; flex: none; }; ::slotted(svg[slot="toggle-icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; } in ExpansionPanelStyle

Fab.default: @slot - Renders the icon of the button. | template: <slot class="icon" aria-hidden="true" @slotchange=...> | CSS: ::slotted(:not([slot])), ::slotted(svg:not([slot])) | slotchange handler: this.querySelector("m3e-fab-menu-trigger") — trigger has no named slot so lands here
Fab.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the close icon when used to open a FAB menu. | template: <slot name="close-icon"> with default SVG fallback (close X) | CSS: ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]), ::slotted(svg[slot="close-icon"])
Fab.label: @slot label - Renders the label of an extended button. | template: <slot name="label" @slotchange=...> inside <m3e-collapsible> | CSS: .base.with-menu ::slotted([slot="label"]) { display: none }

MenuItem.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; template: <slot @slotchange='…'>; _M3eMenuItemElement_defaultSlotChangeHandler checks assignedElements for instanceof M3eMenuTriggerElement (submenu pattern uses <m3e-menu-trigger> in this slot)
MenuItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; template: <slot name='icon' aria-hidden='true'>; ::slotted([slot='icon']) { flex:none; width:1em; font-size: --m3e-menu-item-icon-size }
MenuItem.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; template: <slot name='trailing-icon' aria-hidden='true'> (only rendered when !_hasSubmenu); ::slotted([slot='trailing-icon']) { flex:none; width:1em }

FabMenu.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the menu.; slotchange handler does querySelectorAll("m3e-fab-menu-item"); example shows 6 fabMenuItems

Heading.default: @slot - Renders the content of the heading. | render(): html`<slot></slot>` | examples show plain text content only; no ::slotted selectors or named slots present

ListItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; template: <slot></slot> inside .content div; ::slotted(:not([slot])) applies body.large font styles
ListItem.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; template: <slot name="leading">; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="leading"]) sets icon size/color; _getSlotContentType checks tagName M3E-AVATAR and M3E-ICON
ListItem.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; template: <slot name="overline">; ::slotted([slot="overline"]) applies label.small font styles
ListItem.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; template: <slot name="supporting-text">; ::slotted([slot="supporting-text"]) applies body.medium font styles
ListItem.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; template: <slot name="trailing">; ::slotted(span[slot="trailing"]) label.small text styles; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="trailing"]); _getSlotContentType checks M3E-AVATAR and M3E-ICON for this slot

List.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; template: <slot @slotchange>; _M3eListElement_handleSlotChange filters assignedElements instanceof M3eListItemElement

ListItemButton.default: Inherited from M3eListItemElement (CEM inheritedFrom); render() calls super._renderBase() which renders <slot></slot> in .content div; ::slotted(:not([slot])) font styles
ListItemButton.leading: Inherited from M3eListItemElement; super._renderBase() renders <slot name="leading">; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="leading"]); _getSlotContentType checks M3E-AVATAR, M3E-ICON
ListItemButton.overline: Inherited from M3eListItemElement; super._renderBase() renders <slot name="overline">; ::slotted([slot="overline"]) styles
ListItemButton.supporting-text: Inherited from M3eListItemElement; super._renderBase() renders <slot name="supporting-text">; ::slotted([slot="supporting-text"]) styles
ListItemButton.trailing: Inherited from M3eListItemElement; super._renderBase() renders <slot name="trailing">; ::slotted(span[slot="trailing"]), ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="trailing"]); _getSlotContentType checks M3E-AVATAR

ListAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; template: <slot> forwarded to m3e-list-item-button via re-slot pattern
ListAction.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; template: <slot name="leading" slot="leading" @slotchange="_handleLeadingSlotChange"> forwarded; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="leading"])
ListAction.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; template: <slot name="overline" slot="overline"> forwarded
ListAction.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; template: <slot name="supporting-text" slot="supporting-text"> forwarded
ListAction.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; template: <slot name="trailing" slot="trailing" @slotchange="_handleTrailingSlotChange"> forwarded; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="trailing"])

ExpandableListItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; template: <slot> forwarded to m3e-list-item-button (headline label for the expandable row)
ExpandableListItem.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; template: <slot name="leading" slot="leading" @slotchange="_handleLeadingSlotChange"> forwarded to button
ExpandableListItem.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; template: <slot name="overline" slot="overline"> forwarded to button
ExpandableListItem.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; template: <slot name="supporting-text" slot="supporting-text"> forwarded to button
ExpandableListItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders a custom icon for the expand/collapse toggle.; template: <slot name="toggle-icon"><svg ...default chevron...></svg></slot>; ::slotted(svg[slot="toggle-icon"]) { width:1em; height:1em }
ExpandableListItem.items: @slot items - Container for child list items displayed when expanded.; template: <slot name="items"> inside m3e-collapsible; ::slotted([slot="items"]) display:flex flex-direction:column; handler traverses assignedElements' .childNodes filtering instanceof M3eListItemElement — slot takes a wrapper element (e.g. div), not items directly

ActionList.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; inherited from M3eListElement; notifyItemsChange querySelectorAll('m3e-list-action,m3e-expandable-list-item'); parent _handleSlotChange filters instanceof M3eListItemElement

ListOption.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; template: <slot @slotchange="_handleSlotChange"> in .content div; _handleSlotChange calls getTextContent for value fallback
ListOption.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; template: <slot name="leading" @slotchange="_handleLeadingSlotChange">; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot="leading"]) styles
ListOption.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; template: <slot name="overline">
ListOption.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; template: <slot name="supporting-text">
ListOption.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; template: <slot name="trailing" @slotchange="_handleTrailingSlotChange">; note: CSS hides trailing when selection indicator active — ::slotted([slot="trailing"]) { display:none } unless --hide-selection state set

SelectionList.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; inherited from M3eListElement; notifyItemsChange filters this.items instanceof M3eListOptionElement only

MenuTrigger.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the trigger.; usage shows <m3e-menu-trigger for='…'>Basic menu</m3e-menu-trigger> — text label content

Menu.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the menu.; template: <slot @slotchange='…'>; _handleSlotChange queries querySelectorAll('m3e-menu-item,m3e-menu-item-checkbox,m3e-menu-item-radio'); registerStyleSheet: 'm3e-menu > m3e-divider { margin-block: var(--m3e-menu-divider-spacing) }'

MenuItemCheckbox.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; template: <slot> after the icon div
MenuItemCheckbox.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; template: <slot name='icon' @slotchange='…'> inside .icon div alongside the check SVG; ::slotted([slot='icon']) sizing inherited from MenuItemElementBase.styles
MenuItemCheckbox.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; template: <slot name='trailing-icon' aria-hidden='true' @slotchange='…'>; ::slotted([slot='trailing-icon']) sizing inherited from MenuItemElementBase.styles

MenuItemGroup.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the group.; template: <slot>; M3eMenuItemRadioElement.update() does this.closest('[role=group]')?.querySelectorAll('m3e-menu-item-radio') — confirms radio items are primary children; host has display:contents

MenuItemRadio.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; template: <slot> after the icon div (mirrors MenuItemCheckbox structure)
MenuItemRadio.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; template: <slot name='icon' @slotchange='…'> inside .icon div; ::slotted([slot='icon']) sizing inherited from MenuItemElementBase.styles
MenuItemRadio.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; template: <slot name='trailing-icon' aria-hidden='true' @slotchange='…'>; styles reuse M3eMenuItemCheckboxElement.styles

NavBar.default: @slot - Renders the items of the bar. | render: <slot @slotchange=...></slot> | slotchange handler: this.querySelectorAll("m3e-nav-item") confirms navItem kind; plural 'items' and NodeList collection confirm multi

NavItem.default:
@slot - Renders the label of the item. | render:
| example shows bare text children (News, Global, etc.); label is required for M3 nav item to be functional
NavItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item. | render: <slot name="icon"></slot> | ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-nav-item-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important; } | example: <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="news">
NavItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected. | render: <slot name="selected-icon" @slotchange=_handleSelectedIconSlotChange> | ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-nav-item-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important; } | setCustomState(this, "--with-selected-icon", hasAssignedNodes(e.target))

NavMenuItem.default: @slot - Renders the nested child items.; template: <slot @slotchange=handleItemSlotChange> inside <m3e-collapsible>; handler: .filter(x => x instanceof M3eNavMenuItemElement_1)
NavMenuItem.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the item.; handleSlotChange finds HTMLAnchorElement via instanceof; CSS: ::slotted(a[slot="label"]) { all: unset; }
NavMenuItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) styled width/height 1em at --m3e-nav-menu-item-icon-size
NavMenuItem.badge: @slot badge - Renders the badge of the item.; ::slotted([slot="badge"]) with badge-specific label.large typescale CSS
NavMenuItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected.; ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) styled 1em×1em icon; rendered only when selected and no child items
NavMenuItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the toggle icon.; ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]) styled 1em×1em icon; default SVG fallback in template

NavMenu.default: @slot - Renders the items of the menu.; handleSlotChange: querySelectorAll("m3e-nav-menu-item") for selection management and querySelectorAll("m3e-divider") to set ariaHidden; navMenuItemGroup (display:contents) groups items

NavMenuItemGroup.default: @slot - Renders the items of the group.; template: bare <slot></slot>; group component wraps navMenuItems per Material 3 nav menu taxonomy
NavMenuItemGroup.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the group.; handleLabelSlotChange: assignedElements().find(label) then sets aria-labelledby from element id; CSS hides .label when --with-label state absent

NavRail.default:
CEM slot name="" description 'Renders the items of the bar.' (inherited from M3eNavBarElement); render template in nav-bar.js: html`
` — single unnamed slot; ::slotted(*) { flex: none }; ::slotted(m3e-fab) sets fab elevation tokens; external registerStyleSheet CSS: 'm3e-nav-rail > m3e-icon-button, m3e-nav-rail > m3e-fab { margin-block-end: ... }'; _updateOrientation: querySelectorAll("m3e-fab"); usage example shows m3e-icon-button, m3e-fab, and multiple m3e-nav-item children

Select.default: @slot - Renders the options of the select.; render: <slot></slot> inside .options div; _handleMutation does querySelectorAll("m3e-option"); menu is hidden when _options.length == 0, making options required for functionality
Select.arrow: @slot arrow - Renders the dropdown arrow.; render: <slot name="arrow"><svg class="arrow" ...></svg></slot> — has SVG fallback so not required; CSS: ::slotted([slot="arrow"])
Select.value: @slot value - Renders the selected value(s).; render: <slot name="value">${this.selected...map(x.label)}</slot> — default renders text labels of selected options; no ::slotted selector; not required as default rendering exists

Paginator.first-page-icon: @slot first-page-icon - Slot for a custom first-page icon. Template: <slot name="first-page-icon"><svg ...></slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted([slot="first-page-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-icon-button-medium-icon-size, 1.5rem) }
Paginator.previous-page-icon: @slot previous-page-icon - Slot for a custom previous-page icon. Template: <slot name="previous-page-icon"><svg ...></slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted([slot="previous-page-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-icon-button-medium-icon-size, 1.5rem) }
Paginator.next-page-icon: @slot next-page-icon - Slot for a custom next-page icon. Template: <slot name="next-page-icon"><svg ...></slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted([slot="next-page-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-icon-button-medium-icon-size, 1.5rem) }
Paginator.last-page-icon: @slot last-page-icon - Slot for a custom last-page icon. Template: <slot name="last-page-icon"><svg ...></slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted([slot="last-page-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-icon-button-medium-icon-size, 1.5rem) }

CircularProgressIndicator.default:
@slot - Renders the content inside the progress indicator. | template:
(line 300). No ::slotted selector or instanceof check; no kind constraints.

RadioGroup.default: @slot - Renders the radio buttons of the group. | unnamed <slot> in render template | handleSlotChange calls querySelectorAll("m3e-radio") confirming multi-radio content

SearchBar.leading: @slot leading - Renders content before the input of the bar.; CSS: slot[name="leading"] { --m3e-icon-color: ...; --m3e-icon-button-icon-color: ...; --m3e-icon-size: ... }; ::slotted(svg[slot="leading"])
SearchBar.input: @slot input - Renders the input of the bar.; template: <slot name="input">; instanceof check: x instanceof HTMLInputElement — native <input> expected, no vocab kind applies
SearchBar.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders content after the input of the bar.; CSS: slot[name="trailing"] { --m3e-icon-color: ...; --m3e-icon-button-icon-color: ...; column-gap: ... }; ::slotted(svg[slot="trailing"]); singular handler handleTrailingSlotChange
SearchBar.clear-icon: Not in JSDoc/CEM @slot list; template: <slot name="clear-icon"><svg class="clear-icon" ...> (fallback SVG); CSS: ::slotted([slot="clear-icon"]); slot[name="clear-icon"] { --m3e-icon-size: ... }

SearchView.default: @slot - When open, renders the results content of the view.; template: <slot></slot> inside .scroll-container; results area inherently holds multiple items
SearchView.input: @slot input - Renders the input of the view.; template: <slot name="input" slot="input">; instanceof check: x instanceof HTMLInputElement — native <input> expected, no vocab kind applies
SearchView.open-leading: @slot open-leading - When open, renders content before the input of the view.; template: <slot name="open-leading" slot="leading"> forwarded to inner m3e-search-bar leading slot
SearchView.open-trailing: @slot open-trailing - When open, renders content after the input of the view.; template: <slot name="open-trailing" slot="trailing"> forwarded to inner m3e-search-bar trailing slot
SearchView.closed-leading: @slot closed-leading - When closed, renders content before the input of the view.; template: <slot name="closed-leading" slot="leading"> forwarded to inner m3e-search-bar leading slot
SearchView.closed-trailing: @slot closed-trailing - When closed, renders content after the input of the view.; template: <slot name="closed-trailing" slot="trailing"> forwarded to inner m3e-search-bar trailing slot
SearchView.search-icon: Not in JSDoc/CEM @slot list; template (renderIcon): <slot name="search-icon"><svg class="search-icon" ...> (fallback SVG); CSS: ::slotted([slot="search-icon"])
SearchView.close-icon: Not in JSDoc/CEM @slot list; template (renderBackButton): <slot name="close-icon"><svg class="close-icon" ...> (fallback SVG); CSS: ::slotted([slot="close-icon"])
SearchView.clear-icon: Not in JSDoc/CEM @slot list; template (renderClearButton): <slot name="clear-icon"><svg class="clear-icon" ...> (fallback SVG); CSS: ::slotted([slot="clear-icon"]); slot[name="clear-icon"] { --m3e-icon-size: ... }

ButtonSegment.default: @slot - Renders the label of the option. / <slot></slot> in render template inside .label div; icon-only segments are valid so not required
ButtonSegment.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the option's label. / ::slotted([slot="icon"]) in CSS / singular handler _M3eButtonSegmentElement_handleIconSlotChange (not pluralized)

SegmentedButton.default: @slot - Renders the segments of the button. / querySelectorAll("m3e-button-segment") in _M3eSegmentedButtonElement_handleSlotChange confirms buttonSegment kind; plural wording + multiple items in all examples confirms multi:true; non-functional without segments confirms required:true

Shape.default: @slot - Renders the clipped content of the shape.; render: <slot></slot>; ::slotted(img), ::slotted(video) — accepts img/video but no matching vocabulary kind

Skeleton.default: @slot "" — "Renders the content to be mimicked by the skeleton."; render template: unnamed `<slot ?inert=... @slotchange=...>`; `_createShapes` does `for (const element of slot.assignedElements({flatten:true}).filter(x => x instanceof HTMLElement))` — explicitly iterates multiple assigned elements; no ::slotted selectors constrain accepted kinds

SlideGroup.default: @slot - Renders the content to paginate; template: <slot></slot> inside .content div; no instanceof checks constrain to anything narrower, but M3e taxonomy pairs slideGroup with slide items
SlideGroup.prev-icon: @slot prev-icon - Renders the icon to present for the previous button; template: <slot name="prev-icon"> inside m3e-icon-button with SVG chevron fallback; ::slotted(prev-icon) CSS styles icon dimensions
SlideGroup.next-icon: @slot next-icon - Renders the icon to present for the next button; template: <slot name="next-icon"> inside m3e-icon-button with SVG chevron fallback; ::slotted(next-icon) CSS styles icon dimensions

Slider.default: @slot - Renders the thumbs of the slider. Template: <slot @slotchange="...">. Handler _M3eSliderElement_handleSlotChange filters via x instanceof M3eSliderThumbElement; supports 1–2 thumbs (single vs range), capped at 2 in slotchange handler.

Snackbar.default: @slot - Renders the content of the snackbar.; template: — snackbar is non-functional without message content
Snackbar.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the icon of the button used to close the snackbar.; ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]); template renders inside <m3e-icon-button> with default SVG close icon fallback

SplitButton.leading-button: @slot leading-button - The leading button used to perform the primary action. Template: <slot name="leading-button" @slotchange="handleLeadingSlotChange">. CEM private field #leadingButton: M3eButtonElement | undefined. JSDoc example: <m3e-button slot="leading-button">.
SplitButton.trailing-button: @slot trailing-button - The trailing icon button used to open a menu of related actions. Template: <slot name="trailing-button" @slotchange="handleTrailingSlotChange">. CEM private field #trailingButton: M3eIconButtonElement | undefined. JSDoc example: <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-button">.

SplitPane.start: @slot start - Renders content at the logical start side of the pane.; template: <slot name="start" @slotchange="..."></slot>; no ::slotted selectors or instanceof checks
SplitPane.end: @slot end - Renders content at the logical end side of the pane.; template: <slot name="end" @slotchange="..."></slot>; no ::slotted selectors or instanceof checks

StepPanel.default: @slot - Renders the content of the panel.; template:
StepPanel.actions: JSDoc says '@slot actions-' (trailing-dash typo); template has <slot name="actions"></slot> confirming name is 'actions' (no dash); CSS ::slotted([slot="actions"])

Step.default: @slot - Renders the label of the step.; template: <div class="label"><slot></slot>
Step.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the step.; template: <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) sized to --m3e-step-icon-size
Step.done-icon: @slot done-icon - Renders the icon of a completed step.; template: <slot name="done-icon"> with SVG checkmark fallback; ::slotted([slot="done-icon"])
Step.edit-icon: @slot edit-icon - Renders the icon of a completed editable step.; template: <slot name="edit-icon"> with SVG pencil fallback; ::slotted([slot="edit-icon"])
Step.error-icon: @slot error-icon - Renders icon of an invalid step.; template: <slot name="error-icon"> with SVG warning fallback; ::slotted([slot="error-icon"])
Step.hint: @slot hint - Renders the hint text of the step.; template: <slot name="hint">; ::slotted([slot="hint"]) with body-small typography
Step.error: @slot error - Renders the error message for an invalid step.; template: <slot name="error"> with hint slot as fallback; ::slotted([slot="error"])

Stepper.step: @slot step - Renders a step.; template: <slot name="step" @slotchange="handleSlotChange">; CSS ::slotted([slot="step"]:not(:first-of-type)) and :not(:last-of-type) confirm multiple; querySelectorAll used on panel slot sibling
Stepper.panel: @slot panel - Renders a panel.; template: <slot name="panel">; querySelectorAll("[slot='panel']") to index multiple panels; CSS ::slotted([slot="panel"]:not(:last-of-type))

StepperPrevious.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; StepperButtonElementBase extends ActionElementBase whose render() returns html`<slot></slot>`

StepperReset.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; StepperButtonElementBase extends ActionElementBase whose render() returns html`<slot></slot>`

Tab.default: @slot - Renders the label of the tab. / render: <slot></slot> inside <span class="label">
Tab.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the tab's label. / render: <slot name="icon" aria-hidden="true"> / CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { font-size: var(--m3e-tab-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important; }

TabPanel.default: @slot - Renders the content of the panel. / render: <slot></slot> (sole slot in element); example shows plain text: <m3e-tab-panel id="videos">Videos</m3e-tab-panel>

Tabs.default: @slot - Renders the tabs. / _handleSlotChange: querySelectorAll("m3e-tab") confirms kind=tab and multi; render: unnamed <slot @slotchange> in tablist header
Tabs.panel: @slot panel - Renders the panels of the tabs. / render: <slot name="panel"> inside <m3e-slide> / CSS: ::slotted([slot="panel"]) / querySelectorAll("[slot='panel']")
Tabs.next-icon: @slot next-icon - Renders the icon to present for the next button used to paginate. / render: <slot name="next-icon" slot="next-icon"> forwarded to m3e-slide-group / CSS: ::slotted(next-icon)
Tabs.prev-icon: @slot prev-icon - Renders the icon to present for the previous button used to paginate. / render: <slot name="prev-icon" slot="prev-icon"> forwarded to m3e-slide-group / CSS: ::slotted(prev-icon)

Theme.default: @slot - Renders content styled by the theme. | render(): html`<slot></slot>` — unnamed slot, no ::slotted selectors or slotchange handlers; accepts arbitrary app content

TocItem.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item. / template: <slot></slot> inside <div class='base'> / parent _M3eTocElement_renderNode projects ${node.label} text

Toc.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the table of contents. / ::slotted([slot="overline"]) applies label.small typography / CSS hides .overline div when slot is empty
Toc.title: @slot title - Renders the title of the table of contents. / ::slotted([slot="title"]) applies headline.small typography / CSS hides .title div when slot is empty
Toc.default: @slot - Renders content between the header and items. / template: unnamed <slot></slot> between <div class='header'> and <ul class='list'>; no ::slotted constraint, generic content

Toolbar.default: @slot - Renders the content of the toolbar. render template: <slot @slotchange=...></slot> (unnamed). Example shows multiple <m3e-icon-button> children; slotchange handler collects items array via findInteractiveElements.

TreeItem.default: @slot - Renders the nested child items.; _M3eTreeItemElement_handleItemSlotChange filters assigned elements by instanceof M3eTreeItemElement_1
TreeItem.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the item.; ::slotted(a[slot="label"]) { all: unset; }; _M3eTreeItemElement_handleSlotChange checks instanceof HTMLAnchorElement and stores as link
TreeItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]); querySelectorAll(":scope > m3e-icon[slot]:not([slot='toggle-icon']):not([slot='open-toggle-icon'])")
TreeItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected.; ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]); querySelectorAll(":scope > m3e-icon[slot]...") in update()
TreeItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the toggle icon.; ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]); template renders default SVG fallback inside this slot
TreeItem.open-toggle-icon: @slot open-toggle-icon - Renders the toggle icon when selected.; ::slotted([slot="open-toggle-icon"]); _M3eTreeItemElement_handleOpenToggleIconSlotChange tracks presence via setCustomState

Tree.default: @slot - Renders the items of the tree.; _M3eTreeElement_handleSlotChange uses querySelectorAll("m3e-tree-item") to collect all items; render template: <slot @slotchange="..."></slot>
